properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: path validation (realpath) across processor and manager-api

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: rate limits: login, form submission, manager upload

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: HMAC-SHA256 for auth cookies, CSRF tokens, form tokens; salted iterated SHA-256 password hashing

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: UTF-8 decoding of query-string values in processor

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: file locking (flock), O_RDWR/O_CREAT constants for DB_File ties

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: cache walks, directory enumeration for audit and manager API

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: zip download tempfile, theme upload staging

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: users-admin child process, form webhook delivery with captured output

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: manager API responses, form payloads, plugin --describe, SBOM/manifest output

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: remote content fetch for :::include and url: variables, form webhook delivery

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: strftime for timestamps in logs, manifest, SBOM, zip filenames

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: SSRF guard: inet_aton / inet_ntoa for remote-fetch IP address checks

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: dev server request timing (optional; falls back when unavailable)

properties.name: lazysite:used_by
properties.value: URL parsing in SSRF guard and remote-fetch path resolution

components.description: Perl runtime. Required version 5.10+. On Debian: 'perl'. On Alpine: 'perl'. On RHEL: 'perl'. Includes core modules listed above.
components.name: perl

components.description: CGI host. Operator-provided. Any CGI/1.1-capable server works; Apache is the reference platform. The dev server (tools/lazysite-server.pl) is evaluation-only.
components.name: Apache HTTP Server
